summary: Frontend-only testing of the new customer-reviews display feature on the PHP storefront. ALL six review-feature acceptance criteria PASSED end-to-end against the live preview URL. The 'What our customers say' section renders correctly under the 'Trusted by Thousands' stats band with aggregate 4.7/5 + 'Based on 11 verified customer reviews' caption, 6 review cards (each with stars, Verified badge, comment, avatar initials, name, 'Verified Customer'), and a 'Read all 11 reviews' CTA linking to /reviews.php. Product cards in homepage best-seller/picked-for-you grids and on /shop.php correctly show '(N)' star strips only for products with published reviews; products with zero reviews show no rating strip. Single product detail page for Bitdefender Mac 1-Mac shows 4 full stars + 1 half star + '4.5 (2 reviews)' wrapped in a clickable link to reviews.php?product=... Product detail page for Office Home 2024 Mac (no reviews) correctly omits the rating row. /reviews.php returns HTTP 200 and merges the seeded customer_reviews snippets ('Got my Office key in under 10 minutes', 'Bitdefender activation key arrived in 6 minutes').
critical_code_review_comments: None for the review-display feature scope. Implementation follows the spec: helpers gated on at least one published review with rating, half-star logic works correctly (verified 4.5 -> 4 full + 1 half), data-testid attributes are present on the section/cards/CTA/individual product ratings, aggregate caption uses real DB counts.

Minor observation (not blocking): a separate curl-based regression of /checkout.php redirected to cart.php after submit (302 -> 200). This is unrelated to the review feature (which is display-only) and likely due to a session/cart cookie nuance in the script. Previous iteration_1 already verified the full checkout flow at 100% pass; no review-feature code path touches cart/checkout logic.
test_credentials: Not required for this run; review display is public.
seed_data_creation: Used pre-existing 11 published customer_reviews seeded by main agent. DB verified via SELECT - distribution matches spec (Bitdefender Mac 1-Mac=2, 3-Mac=1, Premium VPN=1, Office 2024 Pro Plus=3, Office Home 2024 PC=2, Office Home & Business 2024 PC=1, Windows 11 Home=1; overall avg 4.7/5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review-display feature is FULLY VERIFIED. data-testid hooks confirmed working: home-customer-reviews, home-review-card (6 cards), view-all-reviews-btn, product-rating-<slug> (both card-variant '(N)' and detail-variant '4.5 (2 reviews)' with half-star). If retesting, just hit / and /product.php?slug=bitdefender-antivirus-for-mac-1-mac-1-year and /reviews.php. Checkout flow was already verified in iteration_1 and is untouched by this feature.
